# Split-Repo Ownership

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/contextmapdocs -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

[Back to context-map.md](../context-map.md)

Rules:

- riido-daemon must not redefine shared task/IR/provider capability facts.
- When both daemon and control-plane need the same DTO/schema, promote it to riido-contracts first.
- Deployment-only facts stay in riido-infra.
- Server runtime behavior stays in riido-control-plane.
- riido-contracts owns the shared meaning of agent profile fields and instruction limits.
- riido-control-plane owns create/save/update API behavior.
- riido-daemon owns only customer-PC runtime consumption of an assigned instruction value.
- The model catalog is a runtime-scoped contracts/control-plane read-model fact.

The daemon must not redefine:

- thumbnail presentation
- one-line description presentation
- created_at / updated_at timestamp meaning
- RBAC/editability
- API shape
- model-default request semantics
- client required-control presentation
- server storage policy

The daemon-side projection of Figma boundaries is [../30-architecture/figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.md](../30-architecture/figma-ai-agent-daemon-boundary.md).

That manifest is a downstream boundary check, not a replacement for contracts/control-plane SSOT.
